title: VPC & Networking Foundation
description:
## Summary
Provision the foundational AWS VPC and networking infrastructure that all other AWS resources depend on.

## Scope
Terraform modules for:
- VPC with public/private subnets across 2-3 AZs
- NAT gateways for private subnet egress
- Internet gateway for public subnets
- Route tables (public and private)
- Security groups (baseline, can be extended by dependent epics)
- VPC endpoints for AWS services (ECR, S3, CloudWatch) to reduce NAT costs

## Key Decisions
- CIDR block sizing: /16 VPC with /20 subnets (4k IPs per subnet)
- AZ count: 2 for cost efficiency (can expand to 3 later)
- NAT gateway: Single for dev, one per AZ for prod

## Deliverables
- Terraform module: `infrastructure/terraform/modules/vpc/`
- Environment configs: dev, staging, prod
- Outputs: VPC ID, subnet IDs, security group IDs for dependent modules

## References
- See `/docs/MIGRATION.md` Phase 1: Infrastructure Foundation
- See `/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` for overall AWS topology

title: Cognito User Pool Infrastructure
description:
## Summary
Provision AWS Cognito user pool and app client for authentication. This is the base infrastructure - SAML configuration is a separate epic.

## Scope
Terraform modules for:
- Cognito User Pool with appropriate password policies
- User Pool App Client (for the Go API)
- User Pool Domain (for hosted UI, needed for SAML flows)
- IAM roles for Cognito

## Configuration
- Password policy: 12+ chars, mixed case, numbers, symbols
- MFA: Optional (can enable per-tenant later)
- Email verification: Required
- Username: Email-based
- Token validity: Access 1hr, Refresh 30 days

## Deliverables
- Terraform module: `infrastructure/terraform/modules/cognito/`
- Outputs: User Pool ID, App Client ID, Domain URL
- Documentation for local development auth flow

## References
- See `/docs/MIGRATION.md` Phase 2: Auth + Database Schema
- See `/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` for auth flow overview
